content.json:
# Azure Functions Cost Allocation
Estimate cost per Azure Function by allocating actual Function App cost across function execution duration. Includes Cosmos dependency and RU investigation panels.

content.query:
let appCostUsd = todouble('{AppCostUsd}');
let functionUsage =
    AppRequests
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | extend FunctionName = tostring(coalesce(
        Properties['FunctionName'],
        Properties['AzureFunctions_FunctionName'],
        OperationName,
        Name))
    | where isnotempty(FunctionName)
    | extend SampleWeight = tolong(iif(isnull(ItemCount) or ItemCount < 1, 1, ItemCount))
    | extend WeightedDurationMs = todouble(DurationMs) * todouble(SampleWeight)
    | summarize
        Executions = sum(SampleWeight),
        Failures = sumif(SampleWeight, Success == false),
        TotalDurationMs = sum(WeightedDurationMs)
      by FunctionName;
let totalDurationMs = toscalar(functionUsage | summarize sum(TotalDurationMs));
functionUsage
| extend DurationShare = iff(totalDurationMs == 0.0, 0.0, TotalDurationMs / totalDurationMs)
| extend EstimatedCostUsd = round(appCostUsd * DurationShare, 2)
| extend EstimatedCostPer1kExecUsd = round(1000.0 * EstimatedCostUsd / iff(Executions == 0, 1.0, todouble(Executions)), 2)
| extend FailureRatePct = round(100.0 * todouble(Failures) / iff(Executions == 0, 1.0, todouble(Executions)), 2)
| top toint('{TopN}') by EstimatedCostUsd desc
| project FunctionName, EstimatedCostUsd, EstimatedCostPer1kExecUsd, Executions, Failures, FailureRatePct, DurationShare
content.title: Estimated Cost By Function

content.query:
AppRequests
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend FunctionName = tostring(coalesce(
    Properties['FunctionName'],
    Properties['AzureFunctions_FunctionName'],
    OperationName,
    Name))
| where isnotempty(FunctionName)
| extend SampleWeight = tolong(iif(isnull(ItemCount) or ItemCount < 1, 1, ItemCount))
| extend WeightedDurationMs = todouble(DurationMs) * todouble(SampleWeight)
| summarize
    Executions = sum(SampleWeight),
    Failures = sumif(SampleWeight, Success == false),
    FailureRatePct = round(100.0 * todouble(sumif(SampleWeight, Success == false)) / todouble(sum(SampleWeight)), 2),
    AvgDurationMs = round(sum(WeightedDurationMs) / todouble(sum(SampleWeight)), 2),
    P95DurationMs = round(percentile(DurationMs, 95), 2),
    TotalDurationMs = round(sum(WeightedDurationMs), 2)
  by FunctionName
| order by TotalDurationMs desc
content.title: Execution And Latency Summary

content.query:
AppRequests
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend FunctionName = tostring(coalesce(
    Properties['FunctionName'],
    Properties['AzureFunctions_FunctionName'],
    OperationName,
    Name))
| where isnotempty(FunctionName)
| extend SampleWeight = tolong(iif(isnull(ItemCount) or ItemCount < 1, 1, ItemCount))
| extend WeightedDurationMs = todouble(DurationMs) * todouble(SampleWeight)
| summarize
    Executions = sum(SampleWeight),
    Failures = sumif(SampleWeight, Success == false),
    TotalDurationMs = sum(WeightedDurationMs)
  by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), FunctionName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Daily Trend

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where tolower(Type) has 'cosmos' or tolower(Target) has 'cosmos'
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Name, Type, Target, Data, Properties, Measurements
| take 50
content.title: Cosmos RU Field Discovery

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where tolower(Type) has 'cosmos' or tolower(Target) has 'cosmos'
| extend FunctionName = tostring(coalesce(
    Properties['FunctionName'],
    Properties['AzureFunctions_FunctionName'],
    OperationName))
| extend SampleWeight = tolong(iif(isnull(ItemCount) or ItemCount < 1, 1, ItemCount))
| extend RequestCharge = todouble(coalesce(
    Measurements['RequestCharge'],
    Measurements['requestCharge'],
    Properties['RequestCharge'],
    Properties['requestCharge'],
    Properties['x-ms-request-charge']))
| where isnotempty(FunctionName)
| summarize
    DependencyCalls = sum(SampleWeight),
    TotalRu = sum(RequestCharge * todouble(SampleWeight)),
    AvgRuPerCall = avg(RequestCharge),
    AvgDurationMs = avg(DurationMs),
    P95DurationMs = percentile(DurationMs, 95)
  by FunctionName
| order by TotalRu desc
content.title: Cosmos RU By Function

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where tolower(Type) has 'cosmos' or tolower(Target) has 'cosmos'
| extend FunctionName = tostring(coalesce(
    Properties['FunctionName'],
    Properties['AzureFunctions_FunctionName'],
    OperationName))
| extend RequestCharge = todouble(coalesce(
    Measurements['RequestCharge'],
    Measurements['requestCharge'],
    Properties['RequestCharge'],
    Properties['requestCharge'],
    Properties['x-ms-request-charge']))
| where isnotempty(FunctionName)
| summarize TotalRu = sum(RequestCharge) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), FunctionName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Cosmos RU Trend

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where tolower(Type) has 'cosmos' or tolower(Target) has 'cosmos'
| extend FunctionName = tostring(coalesce(
    Properties['FunctionName'],
    Properties['AzureFunctions_FunctionName'],
    OperationName))
| extend SampleWeight = tolong(iif(isnull(ItemCount) or ItemCount < 1, 1, ItemCount))
| extend WeightedDurationMs = todouble(DurationMs) * todouble(SampleWeight)
| where isnotempty(FunctionName)
| summarize
    DependencyCalls = sum(SampleWeight),
    Failures = sumif(SampleWeight, Success == false),
    AvgDurationMs = round(sum(WeightedDurationMs) / todouble(sum(SampleWeight)), 2),
    P95DurationMs = round(percentile(DurationMs, 95), 2),
    TotalDurationMs = round(sum(WeightedDurationMs), 2)
  by FunctionName, Target, Name
| order by TotalDurationMs desc
content.title: Cosmos Dependency Usage By Function
